data.body:
## Operator-attested evidence — verify-identity GREEN on main

- Change landed: commit 4aba744a1 (config-drive enforcement + mount tickets store).
- verify-identity workflow run on main tip 4262e3794 (which also carries the perf fix 1cc0): conclusion **success**.
  Run URL: https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29292772021
- Step timing in CI: "Mount tickets branch as a worktree" = 2s; "verify-identity (gating)" = 10s.
- All prior (pre-fix) main commits show the workflow failing (e.g. 4d9caeff7, 80a4a152b) — confirming the fix flipped it from red to green.
